title: GorgiasLite

buildability.reason: The helpdesk app can be built using Shopify App Bridge and Admin API; a 3‑person team can deliver a basic ticketing UI, order lookup, and basic macros within 3 days, and extend to a polished v1 by week 10.

speedToRevenue.reason: The app is listed in the Shopify App Store, is self‑serve, and customers pay the $19/month subscription immediately upon installation.

wedge.reason: Flat monthly price with unlimited tickets (within fair‑use), order lookup in sidebar, canned responses, and macros gives merchants predictable, scalable support without per‑ticket costs.

distribution.reason: Targeting DTC brands under $1M rev, the app can reach the $50K–$2M DTC market via the Shopify App Store and content marketing.

trapRisk.reason: No generative 3D/AR, real‑time voice/video, autonomous repricing, or multi‑app scope; the solution is straightforward and low‑risk for a small team.

expansion.reason: Future features such as AI‑powered canned responses, advanced analytics, and integrations with other Shopify apps can grow revenue from €10K to €1M without pivoting.

technicalSnapshot: The app will be built as a Shopify App using App Bridge for UI, Admin API for ticket CRUD and order lookup, Billing API for subscription, and optional email integration via SendGrid; it will run on a Node.js backend with a React front‑end, hosted on Heroku or Render.

v1Plan.day3: Set up app skeleton, OAuth, ticket CRUD, order lookup sidebar, basic UI.
v1Plan.week3: Add canned responses, macros, email integration, basic analytics, deploy to sandbox.
v1Plan.week10: Implement unlimited tickets with fair‑use cap, subscription billing, performance tuning, marketing assets, launch to App Store.
